betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Electrolyser§f is a 3×4×4 multiblock (TileElectrolyser.java) that uses electrical current to break down molten compounds into their constituent elements — for example separating §6water§f into §6hydrogen§f and §6oxygen§f, or processing molten §6sapphire oxide§f into §6aluminum§f and other metals. It is the keystone machine for §6fluid chemistry§f in the AR progression.

§6Production Path (libVulpes RecipesMachine + TileElectrolyser.java)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Steel Plate§f (libvulpes:productplate:6), 1x §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine), 1x §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), 1x §6Redstone Torch§f
- Power: 30 RF/t baseline; scales with recipe tier
- JEI category: §6Advanced Rocketry: Electrolyser§f

The electrolyser gates the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (10070) and §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062) chains because both require §6liquid oxygen§f, and is also the only path to large-scale §6aluminum§f for the §6Vacuum Laser§f (10014) and §6Rocket Assembler§f (10022). Pair it with the §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017) for closed-loop fluid processing.

§eTip§f: Pipe §6water§f in via a §6Liquid IO Board§f and route the §6hydrogen§f output to a §6Chemical Reactor§f — combining the two machines gives you rocket fuel without an oil refinery setup.
